prestazioni: Engine: VQ30DE (3.0L V6, 190hp stock) – Full forged internals build with Manley 9.0:1 compression forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings. Upgraded to a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.86 A/R, 60mm compressor wheel) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Tomei, paired with a Tomei M82 Type-S wastegate (1.1 bar boost target).

Fuel System: Upgraded to a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (1000cc/min), and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup with -8AN lines to prevent oil buildup in the intake tract. Custom ECU reflash via UpRev Nismo OS with optimized ignition timing (12° BTDC) and fuel maps for E85 compatibility (flex-fuel sensor by Continental).

Suspension & Handling: Full BC Racing BR Type Coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) with Swift Springs and adjustable camber plates. Polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full set) for subframe and control arms. StopTech ST-60 two-piece 13-inch front rotors with 4-piston calipers and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines by Goodridge.
estetica: Body Kit: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion kit (A32-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Seibon. Rear wing: JUN Auto GT-style carbon fiber wing (2.5m width, 300mm height) with adjustable angle mounts.

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 front and 18x10.5 +30 rear, wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40/18 and 275/35/18 tires. Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) by Hardrace for aggressive flush fitment.

Interior: Full Bride Vios III reclining bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, bolted to a custom bolt-in roll cage by Cusco (8-point, mild steel). Custom gauge cluster by Defi Advance BF (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted in a carbon fiber A-pillar pod. Shift knob: NRG Short Throw with weighted titanium finish, paired with a Nismo 6-speed shift boot and e-brake handle.
